shipping.noShipsSubtitle: No owned ships, log in to compute shipping cost.
shipping.label: Shipping
shipping.noShipsTooltip: No owned ships, log in or buy a ship first.

globalOverheadHelp.p1: Every worker you employ raises your company's overhead, which makes every worker across all your bases consume slightly more consumables. So a new production building doesn't just cost its own workers' supplies. It also nudges up the consumables every other building needs.
globalOverheadHelp.excludeBody: profit counts only the recipe's own direct costs. Use this when comparing recipes.
globalOverheadHelp.includeBody: profit also subtracts the ripple cost on the rest of your company. Use this when deciding whether constructing a new building is actually worth it.

vacationHelp.p1: Controls how bases flagged as on vacation in-game feed into the overhead burden. It is independent of the base page's own vacation toggle.
vacationHelp.liveBody: respects the in-game flag, so vacationing bases drop out of the overhead burden.
vacationHelp.noneBody: treats every base as fully active, as if all workforce were recalled.

garco.title: In memoriam (sort of)
garco.quotePrefix: R.I.P to GarCo, may the authorities find the ones who planted the antimatter bomb on his 120kt
garco.attribution: GarCo retired from the game a while back. The hauler was less fortunate.
